message:
style: apply rustfmt across codebase

Consistent formatting pass across calibrate, collect, daemon, decision,
fleet, inference, output, supervision, tui, action, shadow, and test modules.

Key patterns applied:
- Collapse multi-line function signatures to single-line where they fit
  within line width limits
- Expand inline if-else to block form for consistency
- Break long method chains at line width boundaries
- Sort imports and pub mod declarations alphabetically
- Normalize trailing commas and format macro argument alignment
- Reformat long assert expressions across lines

No semantic or behavioral changes — purely formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,23 +49,10 @@ pub struct ResourceTarget {
 impl ResourceTarget {
     pub fn canonical(&self) -> String {
         match self.metric {
-            Metric::Memory => format!(
-                "memory {} {:.0} bytes",
-                self.comparator, self.value
-            ),
-            Metric::Cpu => format!(
-                "cpu {} {:.2}%",
-                self.comparator,
-                self.value * 100.0
-            ),
-            Metric::Port => format!(
-                "release port {}",
-                self.port.unwrap_or(0)
-            ),
-            Metric::FileDescriptors => format!(
-                "fds {} {:.0}",
-                self.comparator, self.value
-            ),
+            Metric::Memory => format!("memory {} {:.0} bytes", self.comparator, self.value),
+            Metric::Cpu => format!("cpu {} {:.2}%", self.comparator, self.value * 100.0),
+            Metric::Port => format!("release port {}", self.port.unwrap_or(0)),
+            Metric::FileDescriptors => format!("fds {} {:.0}", self.comparator, self.value),
         }
     }
 }
